---
layout: cv
title: Ashley Hatch's CV
---

# Ashley Hatch
HR & Administrative Professional | Business Analytics Student

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:ashleyhatch8@outlook.com">ashleyhatch8@outlook.com</a>
| Idaho Falls, ID
| (315) 879-5119
| <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN">LinkedIn</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/YOUR-GITHUB">GitHub</a>
</div>


## Profile

Organized and detail-oriented administrative professional with experience supporting executive leadership, coordinating office operations, improving processes, and providing exceptional customer service. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Business Analytics while building expertise in human resources, business operations, and data-driven decision making.


### Areas of Expertise

Human Resources • Executive Administration • Office Management • Employee Support • Process Improvement • Business Analytics • Customer Service • Project Coordination • Data Analysis • Microsoft Office Suite • Excel • SQL • Python • R


### Professional Interests

Executive Assistance, Human Resources, Operations, Employee Experience, Business Process Improvement, Organizational Development, Data Analytics


## Education

`Expected July 2026`
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__

Bachelor of Science, Business Analytics

- Relevant Coursework:
  - Data Analytics
  - Business Statistics
  - Database Management
  - Financial Management
  - Business Intelligence
  - Forecasting & Modeling


## Professional Experience

`2025 - Present`
__Founder & Consultant__, Experience Design Consulting

- Partner with organizations to improve employee experience and workplace processes.
- Develop systems that increase operational efficiency and organizational effectiveness.
- Create documentation, workflows, and process improvements for business clients.

`Sept 2025 - May 2026`
__Executive Office Manager__, Activated Insights

- Managed executive calendars and daily administrative operations.
- Coordinated meetings, travel, and company communications.
- Supported executive leadership with confidential administrative tasks.
- Improved office organization and workflow efficiency.

`Jan 2025 - May 2025`
__Director of Experience Design__

- Designed initiatives focused on employee engagement and customer experience.
- Coordinated projects across multiple teams.
- Improved internal processes and communication.

`Jan 2024 - Jan 2025`
__Administrative Assistant__

- Managed scheduling, customer communication, and office documentation.
- Assisted leadership with reporting and administrative projects.
- Maintained accurate records and supported day-to-day office operations.

`2022 - 2023`
__Infant & Toddler Teacher__

- Created engaging learning environments.
- Built strong relationships with families.
- Managed classroom organization and daily documentation.


## Projects

### Business Analytics

`2026`

- Built forecasting models using Excel and statistical methods.
- Developed SQL databases and business reports.
- Performed data analysis using R and Python.
- Created interactive dashboards and visualizations.


### HR & Operations

`2025-2026`

- Designed employee experience improvement strategies.
- Created operational workflows and process documentation.
- Assisted with administrative process optimization.


## Technical Skills

- Microsoft Excel
- Microsoft Office
- SQL
- Python
- R
- Power BI 
- GitHub
- Database Management
- Data Visualization


## Leadership

- Employee onboarding support
- Team collaboration
- Process improvement initiatives
- Executive support
- Customer relationship management
